site_functions.name: setTheme
site_functions.description: Switch the website theme between light, dark, or system preference

site_functions.name: navigateToSection
site_functions.description: Update the UI with a navigation payload. Receives badge, title, subtitle, and generativeSubsections. This is the core function for updating the UI state.

badge.description: Context label displayed at the top (e.g. 'MOBEUS CAREER')

generativeSubsections.description: Array of screen sections, each with a templateId and props

templateId.description: Template component name (e.g. GlassmorphicOptions, MultiSelectOptions, TextInput, CandidateSheet, CardStack, Dashboard, ProfileSheet, etc.)

props.description: Props specific to the template component

site_functions.name: navigateWithKnowledgeKey
site_functions.description: Load a static screen from the knowledge base by key. Use this for all welcome journey steps instead of building JSON manually. This is the preferred method for standard screens.

key.description: The knowledge key for the screen to load. Each key corresponds to a predefined UI screen with specific templates and options.
